mapper.select: SELECT * FROM purchase_request WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM purchase_request ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM purchase_request WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM purchase_request WHERE applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_request SET status = #{status}, version = version + 1, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, stocker_id = #{stockerId}, stocker_name = #{stockerName}, approved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'APPROVED' THEN NOW() ELSE approved_at END, rejected_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'REJECTED' THEN NOW() ELSE rejected_at END, stocked_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'STOCKED' THEN NOW() ELSE stocked_at END WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
